description_long: This is a matte black coupe car with a muscular, aggressive stance and a prominent exposed engine protruding from the hood, suggesting a high-performance or modified vehicle. The body is streamlined with smooth, continuous curves and minimal ornamentation, giving it a stealthy, almost menacing appearance. The wheels are solid black with simple, circular cutouts, and the tires appear robust, suitable for urban or street driving. The rear features narrow, horizontal taillights and a subtle lip spoiler integrated into the trunk. The windows are dark and blend seamlessly into the body, with no visible trim or chrome accents. The overall design evokes classic American muscle cars, with a focus on power and speed.
description: A matte black, muscular coupe car with an exposed engine and sleek, aggressive styling. The design is reminiscent of a classic American muscle car, emphasizing power and stealth.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the exposed engine, black wheels, and narrow taillights.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the engine detail, trunk lip spoiler, and the car's wide stance.
description_view_2: Front-side view with a clear look at the smooth hood, exposed engine, and minimal front detailing.
description_view_3: Front three-quarter view emphasizing the engine protrusion, streamlined roofline, and solid black wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
